description_long: This is a sporty, bucket-style recliner seat, commonly found in high-performance vehicles or racing simulators. The seat features a contoured, ergonomic design with pronounced side bolsters for enhanced lateral support and a high backrest for full upper body coverage. The upholstery is smooth and appears to be made of synthetic leather or vinyl, with subtle stitching and a plain, matte finish. The headrest area is integrated and includes a cutout handle, with the brand name 'RECARO' prominently displayed at the top. The seat base is thick and flat, designed for comfort and durability, while the rear view reveals a solid, molded shell construction. There are no visible armrests or footrests, and the reclining mechanism is not externally visible.
description: A black, bucket-style recliner seat with ergonomic contours, high backrest, and smooth upholstery, branded 'RECARO' at the headrest. It features pronounced side bolsters and a solid rear shell.
description_view_0: Front view showing the contoured seat, high backrest, side bolsters, and 'RECARO' branding at the headrest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the ergonomic curve of the backrest and the thickness of the seat base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, smooth shell construction and the headrest cutout handle.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, emphasizing the seat's profile and lack of armrests.
attribute_armrest_design: There are no armrests present; the seat features open sides with pronounced side bolsters for lateral support, covered in the same smooth upholstery as the rest of the seat.
attribute_backrest_segmentation: The backrest is a single continuous piece, smoothly integrated from the seat base to the headrest, with no visible segmentation.
